title: Drypetes porteri

intro: Drypetes porteri, also known as Porter's Drypetes, is a plant species belonging to the family Phyllanthaceae, native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antipyretic properties.
